audit.priceRangeSummary: Examples from pricing docs: Command $1/M input, $2/M output; Command R $0.50/$1.50; Command R+ $2.50/$10; Aya Expanse $0.50/$1.50.
audit.limitsSummary: No public native TTS/STT. LLM quotas vary by plan and endpoint.
audit.regionSummary: Cohere-hosted; sovereign/private deployments also available through partners.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Useful enterprise LLM provider, but treat it as text/multimodal-only for your speech app.

supplementalResearch.title: 7. Cohere (Canada) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 7. Cohere (Canada) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗

**Status:** Active.

**Models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context |
|---|---|---|---|
| `command-a-03-2025` | ~$2.50 | ~$10.00 | 256K |
| `command-r-plus-08-2024` | $2.50 | $10.00 | 128K |
| `command-r-08-2024` | $0.15 | $0.60 | 128K |
| `command-r7b-12-2024` | $0.0375 | $0.15 | 128K |

Command A also has Reasoning, Vision, and Translate variants. Aya multilingual models available.

**Free tier:** Generous trial API key — **1,000 calls/month**, rate-limited. Not for production/commercial use. No time limit.

**Datacenters:** GCP US-Central. Private deployments on AWS, Azure, Oracle, on-prem for EU data residency.

**GDPR:** SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001/42001, HIPAA. DPA available. Data opt-out for training.

**Integration notes:** Cohere uses its own Chat API v2 (`/v2/chat`) — **not OpenAI-compatible**. Native RAG with grounded citations. Streaming supported.

---
